/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/BrushBound.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/BrushBound.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BrushBound.dir/glad.c.o -o /home/keithpx/Documents/BrushBound/BrushBound  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libglm.a -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
